title: Pan-Seared Pike with Russian Pilaf
description: A keto-friendly dish that combines the delicate flavors of pan-seared pike with a side of nutty Russian pilaf.
instructions: Season the pike fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Add the pike fillets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter in a separate pan over medium heat.
Add the Russian pilaf to the pan and stir to combine with the butter.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the pilaf is lightly toasted.
Serve the pan-seared pike with the Russian pilaf and garnish with chopped scallions.
Optional: serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a salad.
